basicDetails.name: Akanksha Yadav
basicDetails.background: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) graduate and passionate about backend development, problem solving, and building AI-powered applications.

education.college: Rajarshi School of Management and Technology

projects.title: Student Management System
projects.description: Developed a secure full-stack Student Management System using Spring Boot with authentication and CRUD operations for managing students and courses.
projects.outcome: Successfully developed a secure web application demonstrating Java Full Stack development skills.

projects.title: Salesforce Validation Manager
projects.description: Developed a web application that generates Salesforce validation rules dynamically based on user input, reducing manual effort and improving productivity.
projects.outcome: Simplified the process of creating Salesforce validation rules through an easy-to-use interface.

projects.title: Candidate Profile AI Agent
projects.description: Developed a Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) based AI application capable of answering interview questions using candidate profile data stored in a JSON knowledge base.
projects.outcome: Successfully developed an AI-powered RAG application that retrieves candidate profile information and generates accurate interview responses using the Groq LLM API.

interviewResponses.introduceYourself: My name is Akanksha Yadav. I recently completed my Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) from Mahatma Gandhi Kashi Vidyapith. After graduation, I joined QSpiders to strengthen my Java Full Stack Development skills. During my training, I gained hands-on experience with Core Java, JDBC, Servlets, Hibernate, Spring Boot, Spring MVC, Spring Security, REST APIs, MySQL, PostgreSQL, HTML, CSS, JavaScript, Git, and GitHub. I developed projects including a Student Management System and a RAG-based Candidate Profile AI Agent with Google OAuth and Groq API integration. These projects enhanced my backend development, database management, authentication, API integration, and problem-solving skills. As a fresher, I am excited to begin my career as an Associate Software Engineer, where I can contribute to meaningful projects while continuously learning and growing.
